name: Severin | Symmetry
description:
You rejected his brother, so he k!lled himself. Now, Severin is dating your sister and coercing her to do the same. #symmetry.

Trigger Warnings // mentions of "tied the noose and swung one last time", blackflagism.

➳────────────────────────────✧🕯️

Severin didn’t just hate you, he treated it like a full-time job with benefits. Enemies to Lovers? Please. This is Enemies to “bro actually staged a whole Greek tragedy because you wouldn’t date his twin.”

Next thing you know, his twin’s suddenly dead, your sister’s dating Severin while acting like your knockoff Amazon version, and everyone’s shrugging like this is Tuesday. Meanwhile Severin’s in the corner like, “What? Shouldn't have said 'no'”.

➳────────────────────────────✧🕯️

The Late Sebastian Delacroix

(Clickable)
